reviewed-bot-commit.evidence: Example only: reviewed source commit recorded as example-commit-or-tag.

target-repo-selected.notes: Select one trusted repository and record only public-safe scope information here.

command-config-reviewed.notes: Review command-only .github/6529bot.yml from the target repository base branch.

dogfood-readiness-passes.notes: Run dogfood readiness with the reviewed target config and private budget policy.

provider-console-readiness-reviewed.notes: Review provider-console-readiness operator evidence before live dogfood model calls.

iam-secret-custody-reviewed.notes: Review iam-and-secrets operator evidence before live dogfood traffic.

app-installed-selected-repo.notes: Install the GitHub App only on selected dogfood repositories.

server-noop-running.notes: Start the central server in noop mode before live worker dispatch.

webhook-ping-accepted.notes: Verify ping delivery and invalid-signature failure.

dry-run-pull-request-delivery.notes: Replay a saved pull_request delivery without queueing workers.

untrusted-actor-denied.notes: Confirm untrusted actors cannot create model-spend jobs.

worker-enabled-conservative.notes: Enable worker traffic only after noop verification.

maintainer-command-triggered.notes: Trigger exactly one small command-only review from a trusted maintainer comment.

bot-comment-reviewed.notes: Review the public bot comment for correctness and data boundaries.

usage-ledger-written.notes: Record aggregate usage, job, budget, and run-control evidence.

budget-and-alerts-visible.notes: Check private budget and alert status surfaces after the first live command.

limited-config-reviewed.notes: Example only: limited initial reviews should wait until command-only evidence is healthy.

initial-review-small-pr.notes: Example only: limited initial review is deferred until command-only dogfood succeeds.

followup-review-verified.notes: Example only: followup automation is deferred until initial review is enabled.

skip-paths-verified.notes: Example only: skip-path verification follows limited initial-review enablement.

public-summary-reviewed.notes: Review public aggregate output and repo disclosure allowlists.

admin-snapshot-reviewed.notes: Run the private admin snapshot after live command-only traffic.

alerts-delivered.notes: Verify dry-run and one operator-owned delivery channel.

rollback-exercised.notes: Exercise a no-spend rollback path before expanding dogfood.

dogfood-decision-recorded.notes: Record expand, continue command-only, defer, or block.
